---
title: "TPM-Normalized Transcript Counts"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.align="center"}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, results='hide', fig.pos = "h", fig.align = "center")

library(grid)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

r_source_dir <- if (dir.exists("R")) "R" else "src/plotting/R"

source(file.path(r_source_dir, "00_figure_config.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "01_config.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "02_themes.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "04_data_loading.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "09_filter_level_lines.R"))

out_dir <- plot_creation_dir()
```


```{r check-paths}
check_paths(src_dirs)
```


```{r load-data}
tool_titles <- c(
  IsoQuant      = "IsoQuant",
  FLAIR         = "FLAIR",
  TALON         = "TALON",
  Bambu         = "Bambu",
  Mandalorion   = "Mandalorion",
  isoseq_sqanti = "IsoSeq + SQANTI3"
)

all_tpm_data <- list()

for (platform in names(src_dirs)) {
  all_tpm_data[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(src_dirs[[platform]])) {
    cat(platform, method, "\n")
    src_dir <- src_dirs[[platform]][[method]]
    paths <- get_paths(src_dir)
    df_lists <- load_df_lists(paths)

    all_tpm_data[[platform]][[method]] <- list(
      brain  = build_tpm_curve_data(df_lists, "brain"),
      kidney = build_tpm_curve_data(df_lists, "kidney")
    )
  }
}

all_tpms <- unlist(lapply(all_tpm_data, function(pl) {
  lapply(pl, function(m) c(m$brain$TPM, m$kidney$TPM))
}))

min_tpm <- min(all_tpms[all_tpms > 0])
max_tpm <- max(all_tpms)

log_thresholds <- 10^seq(log10(min_tpm), log10(max_tpm), length.out = 200)
linear_upper <- quantile(all_tpms, 0.995)
linear_thresholds <- seq(0, linear_upper, length.out = 200)

```


```{r tpm-summary, results='markup'}
cat("=== Global TPM distribution ===\n")
cat(sprintf("  min (nonzero): %.2f\n", min_tpm))
cat(sprintf("  max:           %.0f\n", max_tpm))
cat(sprintf("  99.5th pctl:   %.1f\n", linear_upper))

cat("\n=== Per-tool TPM quantiles (brain) ===\n")
for (platform in names(all_tpm_data)) {
  for (method in names(all_tpm_data[[platform]])) {
    tpm_vals <- all_tpm_data[[platform]][[method]]$brain$TPM
    cat(sprintf("\n%s / %s:\n", platform, method))
    q <- pick_tpm_quantiles(data.frame(TPM = tpm_vals))
    print(round(q, 2))
  }
}

cat("\n=== Per-tool TPM quantiles (kidney) ===\n")
for (platform in names(all_tpm_data)) {
  for (method in names(all_tpm_data[[platform]])) {
    tpm_vals <- all_tpm_data[[platform]][[method]]$kidney$TPM
    cat(sprintf("\n%s / %s:\n", platform, method))
    q <- pick_tpm_quantiles(data.frame(TPM = tpm_vals))
    print(round(q, 2))
  }
}
```


```{r tpm-line-legend, fig.width=18, fig.height=2.5}
tpm_line_legend <- build_tpm_line_legend_figure()

paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "tpm_lines_legend.pdf"),
  plot = tpm_line_legend,
  size = "legend_strip"
)

tpm_line_legend
```


```{r brain-tpm-lines-log, fig.width=18, fig.height=12}
brain_log_line_plots <- list()
for (platform in names(all_tpm_data)) {
  brain_log_line_plots[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(all_tpm_data[[platform]])) {
    title <- tool_titles[[method]]
    if (is.na(title)) title <- method
    curve <- compute_survival_curve(
      all_tpm_data[[platform]][[method]][["brain"]],
      log_thresholds, simplify = TRUE
    )
    brain_log_line_plots[[platform]][[method]] <- create_tpm_line_plot(
      curve, title, log_x = TRUE, xlim = c(0.05, 15)
    )
  }
}

brain_log_figure <- assemble_tpm_line_figure(
  brain_log_line_plots,
  title = "Transcripts by TPM threshold; brain",
  log_x = TRUE
)

paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "brain_tpm_lines_log.pdf"),
  plot = brain_log_figure,
  size = "tpm_lines_10panel"
)

brain_log_figure
```


```{r kidney-tpm-lines-log, fig.width=18, fig.height=12}
kidney_log_line_plots <- list()
for (platform in names(all_tpm_data)) {
  kidney_log_line_plots[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(all_tpm_data[[platform]])) {
    title <- tool_titles[[method]]
    if (is.na(title)) title <- method
    curve <- compute_survival_curve(
      all_tpm_data[[platform]][[method]][["kidney"]],
      log_thresholds, simplify = TRUE
    )
    kidney_log_line_plots[[platform]][[method]] <- create_tpm_line_plot(
      curve, title, log_x = TRUE, xlim = c(0.05, 15)
    )
  }
}

kidney_log_figure <- assemble_tpm_line_figure(
  kidney_log_line_plots,
  title = "Transcripts by TPM threshold; kidney",
  log_x = TRUE
)

paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "kidney_tpm_lines_log.pdf"),
  plot = kidney_log_figure,
  size = "tpm_lines_10panel"
)

kidney_log_figure
```


```{r brain-tpm-lines-linear, fig.width=18, fig.height=12}
brain_lin_line_plots <- list()
for (platform in names(all_tpm_data)) {
  brain_lin_line_plots[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(all_tpm_data[[platform]])) {
    title <- tool_titles[[method]]
    if (is.na(title)) title <- method
    curve <- compute_survival_curve(
      all_tpm_data[[platform]][[method]][["brain"]],
      linear_thresholds, simplify = TRUE
    )
    brain_lin_line_plots[[platform]][[method]] <- create_tpm_line_plot(
      curve, title, log_x = FALSE, xlim = c(0, 15)
    )
  }
}

brain_lin_figure <- assemble_tpm_line_figure(
  brain_lin_line_plots,
  title = "Transcripts by TPM threshold (linear scale); brain"
)

paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "brain_tpm_lines_linear.pdf"),
  plot = brain_lin_figure,
  size = "tpm_lines_10panel"
)

brain_lin_figure
```


```{r kidney-tpm-lines-linear, fig.width=18, fig.height=12}
kidney_lin_line_plots <- list()
for (platform in names(all_tpm_data)) {
  kidney_lin_line_plots[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(all_tpm_data[[platform]])) {
    title <- tool_titles[[method]]
    if (is.na(title)) title <- method
    curve <- compute_survival_curve(
      all_tpm_data[[platform]][[method]][["kidney"]],
      linear_thresholds, simplify = TRUE
    )
    kidney_lin_line_plots[[platform]][[method]] <- create_tpm_line_plot(
      curve, title, log_x = FALSE, xlim = c(0, 15)
    )
  }
}

kidney_lin_figure <- assemble_tpm_line_figure(
  kidney_lin_line_plots,
  title = "Transcripts by TPM threshold (linear scale); kidney"
)

paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "kidney_tpm_lines_linear.pdf"),
  plot = kidney_lin_figure,
  size = "tpm_lines_10panel"
)

kidney_lin_figure
```
